title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: AWS tutorial covering IAM fundamentals including users, roles, policies, least privilege principle, and IAM Access Analyzer. Aimed at beginners to understand access control concepts and avoid common security mistakes like granting administrator access or hardcoding access keys.
